violations.text: Raw animal foods (raw shelled eggs over littlenecks) were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Gaskets for 2 door reach-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and interior of chest freezers (ice accumulation) have an accumulation of pink residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, clutter or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. -Service was contacted. -Establishment will sanitize in the 3 bay sink until dishwasher has been serviced. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the 2 door refrigerator observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024
